scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.deploy:pages: pnpm --filter @workspace/service-dashboard run build && wrangler pages deploy artifacts/service-dashboard/dist/public --project-name=report-automation-hub
